title: Encholirium subsecundum
taxonomy: Encholirium subsecundum belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This classification is due to its characteristic features, such as its epiphytic growth habit and rosette-shaped leaves. The genus Encholirium is a group of plants that are native to South America. Within the Bromeliaceae family, Encholirium subsecundum is a unique species that is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Encholirium subsecundum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, as it is a vascular plant.
